name: Roasted Vegetable Pizzas
recipeIngredient: 1 small red pepper, seeded, cut into 1-inch pieces (1 cup)
1 small zucchini, cut into 1/4-inch thick slices (3/4 cup)
1 small yellow squash, cut into 1/4-inch thick slices (3/4 cup)
1 small red onion, thinly sliced (1 cup)
2 packages prebaked Italian bread shells (4 shells)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine all vegetables.
3. In a small bowl, whisk together vinaigrette ingredients; mix well.
4. Pour the vinaigrette over the vegetables and toss gently to coat.
5. Place the vegetable mixture in an ungreased 15x10x1-inch baking pan.
6. Bake at 450°F for 10 minutes.
7. Meanwhile, place bread shells on an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Stir the vegetables and spoon them onto the shells.
9. Bake at 450°F for 4 to 6 minutes or until the vegetables are tender and the bread shells are hot.
10. Sprinkle mozzarella and Parmesan cheese over the vegetables.
11. Bake an additional 2 to 3 minutes or until the cheese is melted.
4 Pizzas
1 Pizza - for Diabetics
1 Protein Choice
1 Fat Choice
4 Starches
2 Fruits/Vegetables
